hero.sub: Your custom native mobile app — iOS & Android — built, tested, and published on the App Store and Google Play. Guaranteed. Full refund if we miss the deadline.
hero.micro: No agencies. No months of waiting. No $100K budgets. Just your app. Live. In 4 weeks.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.card1Desc: You have a great idea. Traditional agencies treat every project like a Fortune 500 enterprise. You get meetings, proposals, and a quote that makes your stomach drop.
problem.card2Desc: Promised everything. Delivered nothing. Or delivered late, broken, and 3x over budget. You’re left with nothing and no recourse.
problem.card3Title: “6 months of planning, still no app”
problem.card3Desc: Endless calls. Endless revisions. Your competitor launched while you were still in a Notion doc. Analysis paralysis is real.
problem.card4Desc: Investing $100K in an untested idea is terrifying. What if the market doesn’t respond? What if you build it and no one comes?

solution.title: There’s a smarter way.
solution.subtitle: Before you spend $100,000 and 12 months — spend $5,000 and 4 weeks to find out if your idea actually works.
solution.note: We build real, native mobile apps — not web wrappers, not PWAs. Real apps on the App Store and Google Play.

included.title: Everything. For $5,000.
included.card1Desc: Built with React Native or Flutter for full native performance and App Store approval.
included.card2Desc: Same codebase, native feel. Published on Google Play alongside your iOS app.
included.card3Desc: Professional, custom screens designed from scratch. You approve before we build.
included.card4Desc: Authentication, database, push notifications — everything your app needs to function.
included.card5Desc: We handle Apple and Google review, submission, and launch. Stress-free.
included.card6Desc: You receive the Android APK to test on your own phone before the official launch.
included.card7Desc: Post-launch support included at zero extra cost. We fix what needs fixing.
included.card8Desc: Miss the 4-week deadline? You get every single dollar back. No questions asked.
included.note: No hosting fees. No hidden extras. One fixed price. Everything included.

process.title: From idea to App Store in 4 weeks.
process.step1Desc: 30-minute discovery call + 1-hour specification session. We define your app together and confirm it fits our 4-week model.
process.step2Desc: Fixed-price contract signed. Secure payment processed. The clock starts.
process.step3Desc: We design every screen and wireframe. You review and approve before a single line of code is written.
process.step4Desc: Core features built, integrated, and tested in focused daily sprints. You receive progress updates throughout.
process.step5Desc: You receive the Android APK and test the real, working app on your own phone.
process.step6Desc: We submit to the App Store and Google Play, handle review responses, and manage the launch.
process.step7Desc: Your app is live on both stores. Real users. Real downloads. Congratulations.

guarantee.title: If we miss the deadline —
guarantee.body: We are so confident in our 4-week process that we offer a complete, no-questions-asked refund if we miss it. Zero risk on your side. This is our commitment — and our problem if we fail, not yours.

faq.title: Questions? Answered.
faq.q1: Do you build real native apps or web apps?
faq.a1: We build genuine native mobile apps using React Native or Flutter. These are real apps published on the App Store and Google Play — not websites, web wrappers, or Progressive Web Apps. Your users install them directly from the store.
faq.q2: What if my app idea is complex?
faq.a2: We scope your first module to deliver a working, launchable MVP in 4 weeks. Complex projects are broken into sequential $5,000 modules. You control the roadmap — we deliver one module at a time.
faq.a3: We deliver the APK, submit to both stores, and give you 2 weeks of post-launch bug-fix support. The source code is entirely yours. We can continue building features at $5,000 per module whenever you’re ready.
faq.a4: Yes, fully. UI/UX design, wireframes, and all app screens are included in the $5,000. You approve every screen before development begins. There are no additional design fees.
faq.q5: Do you work with clients in the Gulf and Middle East?
faq.a5: Absolutely. We work 100% remotely and serve clients worldwide. We’re particularly focused on entrepreneurs and business owners in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and the wider Arab world.
faq.q6: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a6: We use React Native or Flutter for cross-platform native apps, and Node.js or Firebase for the backend. We select the best stack for your specific project requirements and scalability needs.
faq.a7: Click ‘Start My App’ and fill out a short intake form. We’ll schedule a free 30-minute discovery call to see if we’re a great fit. No commitment required — it’s just a conversation.
faq.a8: No. 5000.live is an independent venture by We Pioners LTD (UK), focused exclusively on native mobile apps for the Middle East and Gulf market. 5000.dev is a completely separate company with no affiliation.

cta.title: Your idea deserves a real shot.
